title: Thirteenth Imperial Prince Noah Ararat
overview: An ordinary village boy wakes up to find he's been reborn as Noah Ararat, the thirteenth prince of the empire.

title: The Birth of the Songstress
overview: While walking through the city, Noah enters a venue and is left speechless by the talent of a singer.

title: Those Gained, Those Lost
overview: Noah gains another powerful subordinate, but suffers a blow when a rebellion breaks out in Almeria.

title: The Almerian Rebellion
overview: Noah deals with the rebel forces leading an uprising in his domain.

title: People Are Treasures
overview: Noah makes it his goal to show his thanks to the people who have given him their loyalty and cooperation.

title: Dark Clouds
overview: Now twelve years old, Noah is recognized for his exceptional knowledge of military affairs and imperial law.

title: The Highest Trust
overview: Noah catches a spy in the act and learns of a plot against the emperor's life.

title: Lightning Prince and Wise Prince
overview: The emperor suggests a potential wife for Noah: the granddaughter of his uncle, Indra the Lightning Prince.

title: Disinheritance
overview: The emperor makes the decision to disinherit the crown prince... but not before seeking Noah's advice.

title: Nobility
overview: Noah catches Albert in the act of attempting a coup and gives him one last chance to repent.
